marketTitle: Will Tommy McMillen win the McMillen vs Montes professional MMA fight scheduled for Jul 18, 2026?
source: authenticated Kalshi UFC Quick Order ticket, $500, NOT submitted
note: THE SIZE-CONFOUND TEST. Same market and same price (0.59) as the $100 example, 5x the size. The first three tickets were all $100, so contracts was not an independent observation — C = (100 - fee)/price made size a mechanical function of price, and rivals of form k*gross^x with x in 0.8-1.5 fitted all three. This point holds price fixed and varies size alone: 164.76 -> 823.81 contracts is a 5.0001x size ratio producing a 5.0000x fee ratio, refuting every exponent but 1.0 (x=0.8 predicts 10.11, x=1.5 predicts 31.19, actual 13.95). Linearity in contracts is measured here, not assumed.
